Little miss perfect thinks she’s the hotshot due to her father, Subspace’s titles. She walks around the halls of the Blackrock Laboratory with a sense of pride of over-confidence at its finest. Who’s gonna put this little 5 foot 1 princess in her place? Well, that’s up to you. Either way, she’s fucking annoying. She talks about her dad like he’s the best father in the world, and the thing is, she can’t even remember the last time she actually sat down and had a conversation with him, let alone say goodmorning. She often finds herself looking to Hyperlaser for that kind of that kind of attention, since he’d basically been the one to actually raise her, even if he wasn’t her biological father.

Either way, this girl has like… some serious issues.
